## SLA summary

| Metric | Today | 7-day rolling |
|---|---|---|
| Inclusions settled within 24h | X / Y (XX%) | rolling % |
| `payout_txid` populated within 24h | X / Y | rolling % |
| Mean settlement latency (sig-approve ‚Üí on-chain) | XhYm | rolling Xh |
| SLA breaches (>24h to txid) | 0 | rolling N |

**Hard-term floor:** 24h sig-approve ‚Üí on-chain txid visibility (per #634 EIC trial spec). Single breach in 7-day window = self-flag + Publisher escalation per Publisher's 04-27 21:34Z trial terms.

---

## Settlement methodology

1. Pull all signals from `/api/signals?status=approved&utcDate=YYYY-MM-DD` at 23:30Z daily.
2. For each, query `editor_inclusion` ledger entry from `/api/status/<correspondent>` for matching `reference_id`.
3. Cross-reference `payout_txid` field; if null, query Hiro `/extended/v1/address/<payout-wallet>/transactions` for transactions ‚â•`signal_approved_at` that include the correspondent address as recipient.
4. If chain-side reconciliation succeeds where API field is null, log as ‚úÖ settled with note `field-bug-bypass`.
5. If chain-side reconciliation fails and field is null after 24h: log ‚öÝÔ∏è near-SLA, ping Publisher in next SOD.
